products.name: Keyhole Column Gown
products.shortDescription: Sculpted neckline with the Maison’s signature keyhole code.
products.description: A couture column gown defined by architectural restraint and luminous hand-finishing. The keyhole motif is framed as negative space, balancing structure and air. Made-to-order in the Maison ateliers.

products.name: Tailored Coat
products.shortDescription: Sharp tailoring with a refined, minimalist finish.
products.description: A modern coat cut with precision and quiet presence. Clean lines, structured shoulder, and a soft interior finish designed for city movement.

products.name: Keyhole Pendant
products.shortDescription: Polished metalwork pendant inspired by couture codes.
products.description: A sculpted pendant with a modern keyhole silhouette. Designed to sit close to the collarbone with subtle shine and weight.

products.name: Sculpted Belt
products.shortDescription: A sculptural accent to frame the silhouette.
products.description: A minimalist belt designed as an object: refined hardware, balanced proportions, and a couture-inspired presence.

products.name: Architect Heel
products.shortDescription: Clean lines with an architectural stance.
products.description: A sharp heel that grounds the look. A sculpted profile and confident balance designed for evening presence.
